name: Haworth Bilberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the bilberries and half the caster sugar.
2. Core the apples and bake until tender.
3. Scrape out the apple pulp and sweeten with the remaining sugar. Combine this mixture with the bilberries.
4. Butter and line a pie plate with pastry.
5. Put in the bilberry filling and cover with pastry.
6. Brush with egg white if using shortcrust pastry.
7. Sprinkle with a thin layer of sugar. If using puff pastry, glaze with an egg glaze.
8. Bake in a hot oven (gas 6 to 7, 200 - 220°C/400 - 425°F) until the pastry is set.
9. Lower the heat to moderate (gas 4, 180°C/350°F) and cook the fruit.
10. Serve with cream.
